response.overview: # The Story of Dahlia  A story about a woman named Dahlia who is steadfast in maintaining harmony and happiness in her household. Dahlia is a full-time housewife who deeply loves her only child Aina. Although life appears happy on the surface, Dahlia often feels trapped. Unlike her husband Ezani, who is successful and constantly busy with his career. Dahlia's sense of loneliness worsens when she learns that Maira, Ezani's former lover, will be entering into a business partnership with her husband at his workplace. Maira will become a lawyer for Ezani's company. Because of this, Dahlia conspires with Laila, Ezani's colleague, to spy on him at work. Not only that, Laila also warns Maira to stay away from Ezani because he is a married man. Laila also advises Ezani not to be close to Maira for Dahlia's sake. Laila's advice leaves some impact in Ezani's heart. To clarify the situation, Ezani makes a surprise by gifting a bouquet of flowers to Dahlia.
response.title: Janji Pada Hati
